---
title: "Beech (Fagus sylvatica)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Fagus*](/trees/genus/fagus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 142 — Beech](../142.html) |  |
| [Tree 143 — Beech](../143.html) |  |
| [Tree 144 — Beech](../144.html) |  |
| [Tree 145 — Beech](../145.html) |  |
| [Tree 149 — Beech](../149.html) |  |
| [Tree 150 — Beech](../150.html) |  |
| [Tree 151 — Beech](../151.html) |  |
